name: LeviathanTale
description:
You can be whatever sea creature/ half sea creature you'd like (example: siren, mermaid, leviathan, etc.) Just use either a persona and/or put the description of yourself/ your character in the chat summary. P.S. Ink and Dream are exes. Fatal Error lost his traits of a siren, in exchange for the strength of/greater than a leviathan. (Sorry for the spoilers, the fic is great though, yet is unfinished and hasn't been updated since Jan 2024) This bot contains characters from the undertale universe Leviathantale. I do not support the creator of Leviathantale, as they support incest in their posts claiming that just because it is fiction it doesn't count. I am only using the au for the concept. The characters are based on Applebloomer's take of the characters. You can find Applebloomer through Ao3, via their fic called 'Reeftale: Call of the Abyss'. Let me know if you'd like a bot with only one of the characters! :D

(Created: 4/6/2024) Update (4/9/2024): I'll be moving some characters to have their own bot in the Reef siren kingdom (Fatal, Swap, and Red), hopefully this will make the bot work better.

Character's included/to be included:

- Nightmare Sans (Done)

- Cross Sans (Done)

- Killer Sans (Done)

- Horror Sans (Done)

- Dust Sans (Done)

- Dream Sans (fem) (Done)

- G̶e̶n̶o̶!̶S̶a̶n̶s̶ Fatal Error (Done) [moved]
